`libs/libcrypto.a`, `libs/libcrypto.a` and `include/openssl` is built from https://github.com/jedisct1/openssl-wasm with `no-threads` removed (not sure if that affected anything)  

`libs/libsqlite3.a`, `include/sqlite.h` and `sqlite3ext.h` is from https://github.com/vmware-labs/webassembly-language-runtimes/releases/tag/libs%2Fsqlite%2F3.42.0%2B20230623-2993864  

`libs/uuid.a`, `include/uuid/` is from https://github.com/vmware-labs/webassembly-language-runtimes/releases/tag/libs%2Flibuuid%2F1.0.3%2B20230623-2993864  

`libs/libz.a`, `include/zlib.h` and `include/zconf.h` is from https://github.com/vmware-labs/webassembly-language-runtimes/releases/tag/libs%2Fzlib%2F1.2.13%2B20230623-2993864

`libs/libbz2.a` and `include/bzlib.h` is from https://github.com/vmware-labs/webassembly-language-runtimes/releases/tag/libs%2Fbzip2%2F1.0.8%2B20230623-2993864

`lib/libgcc.a`, `lib/liblzma.a`, `include/lzma.h` and `include/lzma/` is from https://github.com/singlestore-labs/python-wasi/tree/main/docker
